plan.title: Therapeutic Progression Plan
plan.subtitle: A meticulously structured 90-day journey designed to optimize patient outcomes through measured assessment, precise titration, and monthly clinical reviews.

initialAssessment.title: Initial Assessment
initialAssessment.description: Comprehensive clinical intake, symptom baseline mapping, and initial therapeutic goal setting.

titrationCommencement.title: Titration Commencement
titrationCommencement.description: Implementation of the starting dosage. Daily log monitoring to track adverse effects and symptom relief.

doseAdjustmentReview.title: Dose Adjustment Review
doseAdjustmentReview.description: Clinical analysis of the first 30 days of titration to determine the optimal steady-state dosage.

monthlyClinicalReview.title: Monthly Clinical Review
monthlyClinicalReview.description: Second comprehensive review to confirm therapeutic efficacy and ensure stable progress.

cycleCompletion.title: Cycle Completion & Renewal
cycleCompletion.description: Final assessment of the 90-day protocol. Determining maintenance dosage or transitioning to the next cycle.

help.title: Help & support
help.subtitle: Documentation, guides and direct support for your use of Cannathera.
help.docsText: Manuals on patient onboarding, course documentation and reports.
help.videosText: Step-by-step guides for common clinical tasks.
help.contactText: A direct line to our medical IT team.

questions.q1: How do I onboard new patients?
questions.a1: Patients register through the Cannathera app and select your practice. Alternatively, use “Add patient” in the patient roster.
questions.q2: Can I export course data for insurers?
questions.a2: Yes. Monthly, quarterly and long-term reports (including beyond 90 days) can be exported as PDF (module M7).
questions.a3: Yes. Health data is processed only with explicit consent (Art. 9 GDPR), stored encrypted, and every access is logged.
questions.a4: Rules are defined per questionnaire in the database. Critical answers immediately raise an alert on your dashboard.
questions.q5: How do I start a video consultation?
questions.a5: From the appointment briefing or the patient record. The Zoom integration is activated with module M9.
questions.a6: Yes — questionnaires, questions and alert rules are data, not code. New forms appear without an update.

newPatient.subtitle: You create the account — the patient sets their own password via the setup link and can then edit their details themselves.

newPatient.credsHint: Hand these credentials over securely. The person must set their own password at first login.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Protecting your personal data — in particular your health data — is Cannathera's highest priority. We process your data exclusively on the basis of the applicable law (GDPR, BDSG) and this privacy policy.

sections.data: Master data (name, email address, date of birth), access data (passwords stored encrypted), health data within the therapy accompaniment (Art. 9 GDPR), and technical log data (audit log).
sections.purpose: Your health data is processed exclusively on the basis of your explicit consent (Art. 9 (2) (a) GDPR), which you give at registration and may withdraw at any time. Other data is processed to perform the contract (Art. 6 (1) (b) GDPR) and to comply with legal obligations (Art. 6 (1) (c) GDPR).
sections.sharing: Your course reports are transmitted to your treating doctors or your pharmacy only with your separate consent. Without consent, no data is shared.
sections.storage: Your data is processed encrypted (in transit and at rest) on servers in Germany (AWS Frankfurt, eu-central-1). Passwords are stored as hashes only. All access is logged.
sections.rights: You have the right of access (Art. 15), rectification (Art. 16), erasure (Art. 17), restriction (Art. 18), data portability (Art. 20) and objection (Art. 21 GDPR). You may withdraw consent at any time with future effect. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
sections.retention: We store personal data only for as long as is necessary for the stated purposes or as long as statutory retention obligations apply. After you withdraw your consent, health data is deleted unless a legal obligation to retain it exists.

privacy.notice: Note: this privacy policy is a preliminary version. Placeholders will be completed before going live; the final version will undergo a data protection review.
